zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine De Tuberville於1294年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根可迪時，她的父親Pain de Turberville30歲，母親Gwenllian de Talbot24歲。她於1332年與Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾巴薩利格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine De Tuberville于1294年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根可迪时，她的父亲Pain de Turberville30岁，母亲Gwenllian de Talbot24岁。她于1332年与Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾巴薩利格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tuberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine De Tuberville was born in 1294, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Pain de Turberville, was 30 and her mother, Gwenllian de Talbot, was 24. She married Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles in 1332, in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1357, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine De Tuberville est née en 1294, à Coity, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Pain de Turberville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian de Talbot, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles en 1332, à Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1357, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine De Tuberville 1294 in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pain de Turberville 30 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian de Talbot 24. Sie hat 1332 in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1357 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles nel 1332, nel Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Catherine De Tubervilleが1294年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンコイトイで生まれた時，父Pain de Turbervilleは30歳，母Gwenllian de Talbotは24歳であった。1332年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアバッサレグでSir Lawrence Roger Berkerollesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine De Tuberville(이)가 1294년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pain de Turberville(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian de Talbot(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1332년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 배사일그에서 Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles em 1332, em Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine De Tuberville родилась в 1294 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Pain de Turberville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian de Talbot, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles в 1332 г. в местности бассеилег, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1357 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Sir Lawrence Roger Berkerolles en 1332, en Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1357, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
